name: Italian Tomato Bisque
recipeInstructions:
1. Blanch the tomatoes until the skin comes loose, then remove the skin, seeds, and chop coarsely.
2. Sauté onion in butter for a few minutes.
3. Add all ingredients except milk and half-and-half to the pan. Simmer for about 25 minutes, removing cloves before straining.
4. Transfer to a blender or food processor and puree.
5. Stir in half and half, and milk.
6. If preparing ahead of time, refrigerate until ready to serve.
7. Heat in a saucepan and sprinkle chives on top before serving.
